violations.text: The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 25 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Dishwasher was primed to increase concentration. Service call placed during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/22/2025
Leak observed under the 3-bay sink area. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. Parts have been ordered to repair this leak. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025
Menu is lacking an allergen statement. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2025

An employee was observed touching ready to eat food (oranges for drinks) with bare hands. Food employees must not touch exposed, ready-to-eat food with their bare hands and shall use suitable utensils such as deli tissue, spatulas, single use gloves, or dispensing equipment. Voluntary disposal during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black, brown, and pink residues. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Pasta, which was prepared in advance, was not cooled to 70 degrees Fahrenheit in 2 hours and then to 41 degrees Fahrenheit within 4 hours. Pasta was observed with a temperature 69 degrees F in the walk-in cooler. Voluntary disposal during inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Pasta was placed hot in the refrigerator in containers greater than four inches deep. Proper cooling methods reviewed. New Violation. Correct By: 09/11/2025
Leak observed under the sinks at the dishwasher. Plumbing must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/15/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) were observed with an accumulation of black/pink residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine is being cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/25/2024

The cutting board of the prep unit is very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 10/23/2024

The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. In addition, the specials menu is lacking the consumer advisory. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
Spray bottle used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies was not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2023
